description: JBoss Threads provides thread, executor, thread-factory, and thread-pool utilities for Java applications and JBoss-based runtimes. It includes executor implementations such as enhanced queue-based executors, direct and blocking executors, shutdown listeners, management interfaces, and helpers for naming, wrapping, and handling threads.

JBoss Threads provides thread, executor, thread-factory, and thread-pool utilities for Java applications and JBoss-based runtimes. It includes executor implementations such as enhanced queue-based executors, direct and blocking executors, shutdown listeners, management interfaces, and helpers for naming, wrapping, and handling threads.
